endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/microsoft.insights/logprofiles
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/microsoft.insights/logprofiles/{logProfileName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOGPROFILENAME}} with a real logprofilename.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/microsoft.insights/logprofiles/{logProfileName}
endpoints.description: Create or update a log profile in Azure Monitoring REST API.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOGPROFILENAME}} with a real logprofilename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/microsoft.insights/logprofiles/{logProfileName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOGPROFILENAME}} with a real logprofilename.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/microsoft.insights/logprofiles/{logProfileName}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing LogProfilesResource. To update other fields use the CreateOrUpdate method.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOGPROFILENAME}} with a real logprofilename.
